location.name: Porto Moniz Natural Swimming Pools
location.summary: Volcanic rock pools continuously refreshed by Atlantic seawater on Madeira’s north-west coast.
location.imageAlt: Volcanic natural swimming pools in Porto Moniz, Madeira
location.mapQuery: Porto Moniz Natural Swimming Pools Madeira

article.intro: Porto Moniz Natural Swimming Pools are seawater pools formed among black volcanic rocks on Madeira’s north-west coast.
article.history: The pools are shaped by volcanic geology and receive fresh Atlantic water through natural openings in the rock.
highlights: Swimming areas set within volcanic rock formations
A memorable stop on a north-west Madeira road trip
article.practicalTip: Check opening times, local sea conditions and wind before travelling; the coast can be rough outside calm periods.
